segments.text: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, if you have shaken hands in pledge for a stranger,
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: you have been trapped by what you said, ensnared by the words of your mouth.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: So do this, my son, to free yourself, since you have fallen into your neighbor's hands: Go—to the point of exhaustion— and give your neighbor no rest!
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Allow no sleep to your eyes, no slumber to your eyelids.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Free yourself, like a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, like a bird from the snare of the fowler.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Go to the ant, you sluggard; consider its ways and be wise!
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: It has no commander, no overseer or ruler,
yet it stores its provisions in summer and gathers its food at harvest.
How long will you lie there, you sluggard? When will you get up from your sleep?
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: A little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to rest—
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: and poverty will come on you like a thief and scarcity like an armed man.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: A troublemaker and a villain, who goes about with a corrupt mouth,
who winks maliciously with his eye, signals with his feet and motions with his fingers,
who plots evil with deceit in his heart— he always stirs up conflict.
Therefore disaster will overtake him in an instant; he will suddenly be destroyed—without remedy.
There are six things the Lord hates, seven that are detestable to him:
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: haughty eyes, a lying tongue, hands that shed innocent blood,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: a heart that devises wicked schemes, feet that are quick to rush into evil,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: a false witness who pours out lies and a person who stirs up conflict in the community.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: My son, keep your father's command and do not forsake your mother's teaching.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Bind them always on your heart; fasten them around your neck.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: When you walk, they will guide you; when you sleep, they will watch over you; when you awake, they will speak to you.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: For this command is a lamp, this teaching is a light, and correction and instruction are the way to life,
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: keeping you from your neighbor's wife, from the smooth talk of a wayward woman.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Do not lust in your heart after her beauty or let her captivate you with her eyes.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: For a prostitute can be had for a loaf of bread, but another man's wife preys on your very life.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Can a man scoop fire into his lap without his clothes being burned?
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Can a man walk on hot coals without his feet being scorched?
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: So is he who sleeps with another man's wife; no one who touches her will go unpunished.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: People do not despise a thief if he steals to satisfy his hunger when he is starving.
Yet if he is caught, he must pay sevenfold, though it costs him all the wealth of his house.
But a man who commits adultery has no sense; whoever does so destroys himself.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: Blows and disgrace are his lot, and his shame will never be wiped away.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: For jealousy arouses a husband's fury, and he will show no mercy when he takes revenge.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher

segments.text: He will not accept any compensation; he will refuse a bribe, however great it is.
segments.speaker: Wise Teacher
